articles.title: Iran and US race to find missing American pilot downed in fighter jet - reports - bbc.com
articles.description: Iranian security forces are searching for the missing crew member, Iranian state media report, after a US F-15 fighter jet was reportedly downed in southern Iran.
articles.content:
Grace Eliza GoodwinReporting from New York
Experts are telling the BBC that the ongoing search for the missing crew member of the downed US fighter jet is extremely time-sensitive, as Iran races to … [+1603 chars]
